texto: Mindfulness works like a vaccine, boosting natural resilience. You undertake practices that can initially feel odd or counterintuitive. You practise in safe, low-risk ways, stimulating the recovery and growth mechanisms of the human mind and emotions. Meditating builds resilience muscles that are strong enough to kick in during stressful moments in life, when you need them the most.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Meg Salter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Mindfulness works like a vaccine, boosting natural resilience. You undertake practices that can i…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, mindfulness, resilienceience pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e resilienceience.
